brokers.name: Spokeo
brokers.notes: Opt-out requires email confirmation. Profiles can reappear after new data pulls.

brokers.name: Whitepages
brokers.notes: Suppression request tool; also owns some smaller lookup sites.

brokers.name: BeenVerified
brokers.notes: Part of the PeopleConnect network (shares data with TruthFinder, Instant Checkmate).

brokers.name: Intelius
brokers.notes: Also powers ZabaSearch and Public Records Now opt-outs.

brokers.name: PeopleFinders
brokers.notes: Shares infrastructure with TruePeopleSearch's parent network.

brokers.name: Radaris
brokers.notes: Known to be slow to honor removals; re-check sooner than most.

brokers.name: MyLife
brokers.notes: Reputation-score profiles; opt-out is via the CCPA request form.

brokers.name: TruthFinder
brokers.notes: Part of the PeopleConnect network; opting out here does not cover BeenVerified.

brokers.name: Instant Checkmate
brokers.notes: Part of the PeopleConnect network.

brokers.name: USSearch
brokers.notes: Owned by PeopleConnect.

brokers.name: PeopleLooker
brokers.notes: Requires locating your profile first, then submitting the removal form.

brokers.name: Nuwber
brokers.notes: Removal form sends a confirmation email that must be clicked.

brokers.name: FastPeopleSearch
brokers.notes: Free lookup site; historically re-lists data faster than paid competitors.

brokers.name: FamilyTreeNow
brokers.notes: Genealogy-framed people search; opt-out requires finding your exact record.

brokers.name: PeekYou
brokers.notes: Aggregates social media and public profile links.

brokers.name: ClustrMaps
brokers.notes: Address-lookup site; opt-out is per-address.

brokers.name: ThatsThem
brokers.notes: Free lookup site with frequent data refreshes.

brokers.name: USPhonebook
brokers.notes: Opt-out requires the exact profile URL for your listing.

brokers.name: Acxiom (LiveRamp)
brokers.notes: Large marketing-data aggregator; feeds many downstream advertisers.

brokers.name: LexisNexis Risk Solutions
brokers.notes: Feeds background-check and identity-verification products; opt-out can take weeks to process.

brokers.name: Cotality (formerly CoreLogic)
brokers.notes: Property and tenant-screening data broker; rebranded from CoreLogic to Cotality in 2025.

brokers.name: Innovis
brokers.notes: The fourth major credit bureau; separate opt-out from Equifax/Experian/TransUnion.

brokers.name: Experian (marketing lists)
brokers.notes: Opts out of prescreened offer lists, not your core credit file.

brokers.name: Equifax (marketing lists)
brokers.notes: Opts out of prescreened offer lists, not your core credit file.

brokers.name: TransUnion (marketing lists)
brokers.notes: Opts out of prescreened offer lists, not your core credit file.

brokers.name: Spy Dialer
brokers.notes: Reverse phone lookup; removal is handled via their contact form.

brokers.name: Public Records Now
brokers.notes: Part of the Intelius network.

brokers.name: Smart Background Checks
brokers.notes: Removal form requires matching your listed record exactly.

brokers.name: SearchPeopleFree
brokers.notes: Free lookup site; historically re-lists data quickly.

brokers.name: PeopleWhiz
brokers.notes: Removal form requires the profile URL.

brokers.name: InfoTracer
brokers.notes: Removal is per-record; multiple listings may need separate requests.

brokers.name: CheckPeople
brokers.notes: Removal form requires locating your report first.

brokers.name: CocoFinder
brokers.notes: Removal form requires the profile link.
